title: Rename SWEM Horses
description: This is a simple resource pack that adds translation data to rename 'SWEM Horses' to 'Horses'.
body:
This is a simple resource pack that adds translation data to rename 'SWEM Horses' to 'Horses'.

![A screenshot of minecraft showing the change in name from 'SWEM Horse' to 'Horse'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708059634269d95f361a027f7ff2006ec89f6cf5_0.webp)
